title: Self-Awareness
objective: Students will explore self-awareness concepts including Patterns in Your Own Reactions.

steps.content: Have you ever thought about Patterns in Your Own Reactions? Let's find out together!
Notice patterns in your own reactions — 'I tend to respond like this when I'm tired, left out, or put on the spot'
Time to try this out: middle childhood self-reliance in emotion regulation
Has you ever noticed a pattern in how they react — for example, that they get more upset at certain times of day, or that a particular type of situation reliably triggers a strong feeling?
Great job! Today we learned about Patterns in Your Own Reactions. middle childhood self-reliance in emotion regulation 7-year developmental shift in self-understanding research
